CONSOLIDATION — Expected: durable, team-relevant learnings persisted before the session ends. Actual: no consolidation has run this session. Do now: enumerate this session's durable learnings and route each to its backend (auto-memory = project-local facts; .claude/knowledge = durable team gotchas/decisions/conventions; Forgetful = cross-session architecture), then persist. If nothing durable emerged, say so and stop.
